testcase.name: extractCatalogFunctions > extracts function definitions from TS fixtures
extractCatalogFunctions > writeCatalogArtifacts emits component files and function schemas
extractCatalogComponents > extracts component schemas from TSX catalog fixtures
extractCatalogComponents > writes catalog.json files from TSX catalog fixtures
extractCatalogComponents > creates a full catalog from TSX-extracted components
extractCatalogComponents > writes catalog files from an existing TypeDoc JSON project through the CLI
extractCatalogComponents > writes the configured catalog ID to the full catalog file
extractCatalogComponents > throws for ambiguous intrinsic catalog property types in TSX fixtures
extractCatalogComponents > throws for nullable unions in TSX fixtures
genui a2ui create > creates a project with default template
genui a2ui create > fails when target directory is not empty
genui a2ui create > uses custom project name in package.json
genui a2ui create > shows help with --help flag
genui a2ui create > rejects unknown template
genui a2ui generate catalog > shows help with --help flag
genui a2ui generate catalog > throws when no source files found
genui a2ui generate prompt > shows help with --help flag
genui a2ui generate prompt > generates prompt to stdout with built-in catalog
genui a2ui generate prompt > generates prompt to file with --out
genui a2ui generate prompt > accepts --appendix option
genui a2ui generate prompt > throws with empty catalog directory
pluginLynxConfig > should throw error when no LynxTemplatePlugin exposed
pluginLynxConfig > should throw error when lynx:react plugin exists
pluginLynxConfig > should throw error when lynx:vue plugin exists
pluginLynxConfig > should have LynxTemplatePlugin passed to LynxConfigWebpackPlugin
LynxCacheEventsSetupListRuntimeModule > caches and replays tt method calls
LynxCacheEventsSetupListRuntimeModule > caches and replays performance events
LynxCacheEventsSetupListRuntimeModule > caches and replays globalThis.loadDynamicComponent calls
loader > offsets generated source map lines when cssId wraps CSS content
loader > keeps empty source maps unchanged
Rspack TestCases > asset-modules should compile to the expected result
Rspack TestCases > at-import should compile to the expected result
Rspack TestCases > at-import-in-the-entry should compile to the expected result

Rspack TestCases > base-uri-in-entry should compile to the expected result

Rspack TestCases > css-id-at-import should compile to the expected result

Rspack TestCases > hmr-locals should compile to the expected result

Webpack TestCases > at-import-in-the-entry should compile to the expected result
Webpack TestCases > base-uri should compile to the expected result
Webpack TestCases > base-uri-in-entry should compile to the expected result
Webpack TestCases > css-id-asset-modules should compile to the expected result
Webpack TestCases > css-id-at-import should compile to the expected result
Webpack TestCases > hmr should compile to the expected result
Webpack TestCases > hmr-locals should compile to the expected result
ReactRefresh plugins > ReactRefreshWebpackPlugin intercept code generation in dev
ReactRefresh plugins > ReactRefreshRspackPlugin intercept code generation in dev
collectElementTemplatesFromModule > collects templates from nested modules
mergeElementTemplate > keeps one entry for duplicate same-id same-content templates
mergeElementTemplate > throws when duplicate same-id templates have different content
mergeElementTemplatesFromModule > merges duplicate same-id same-content templates collected from nested module buildInfo
mergeElementTemplatesFromModule > throws when collected nested module buildInfo has same-id different-content templates
background loader > compiles ET background output to Preact JSX with multi-slot template ids
loader options > uses ET backend with all CSS scoped when enableRemoveCSSScope is false
main-thread loader > clears stale element-template build info when recompilation stops emitting templates
Lazy Bundle Sourcemap Verification > should verify main-thread.js has wrapper and a correctly-shifted sourcemap
Lazy Bundle Sourcemap Verification > should verify non-lazy async main-thread chunks also shift sourcemaps after wrapper injection
testing loader > handles partial compat object (missing target) without throwing
testing loader > handles compat: false without throwing
testing loader > handles missing compat (defaults to false) without throwing
testing loader > forwards element-template mode to the transform
testing loader > targets the shared legacy runtime for compat output in element-template mode
testing loader > targets public internal helpers for compat component wrappers in element-template mode
worklet-runtime bundler guardrails > should emit the expected worklet chunks for chunk
worklet-runtime bundler guardrails > should emit the expected worklet chunks for not-using
LynxTemplatePlugin > emits css diagnostics during beforeEmit with current css chunk source maps
LynxTemplatePlugin > maps css diagnostics to the matching source map for each entry
requireModuleAsyncCachePolyfill > Parallel calls with the same moduleUrl will eval twice by default
requireModuleAsyncCachePolyfill > The polyfill should cache the result
cssDiagnostics > extract tasm css diagnostics from JSON string
cssDiagnostics > resolve tasm css diagnostics with css source map
cssDiagnostics > resolve tasm css diagnostics with first mappable source map
cssDiagnostics > skip mapped source when file does not exist
cssDiagnostics > dedupe resolved tasm css diagnostics by message and location
cssDiagnostics > dedupe resolved tasm css diagnostics across batches
cssDiagnostics > process tasm css diagnostics from raw value to deduped diagnostics
cssDiagnostics > process tasm css diagnostics ignores invalid css source maps
cssDiagnostics > collect css source maps from chunk source.map()
LynxEncodePlugin shared worker pool > runs multi-entry encodes in parallel via the shared pool
LynxEncodePlugin shared worker pool > subsequent compile reuses warm workers (no respawn)
LynxTemplatePlugin.getLynxTemplatePluginHooks - cross-module singleton > returns the same hooks for the same compilation across calls
LynxTemplatePlugin.getLynxTemplatePluginHooks - cross-module singleton > returns distinct hooks for distinct compilations
LynxTemplatePlugin.getLynxTemplatePluginHooks - cross-module singleton > real instance writes first, second physical copy reads the same hooks
LynxTemplatePlugin.getLynxTemplatePluginHooks - cross-module singleton > second physical copy writes first, real instance reads the same hooks
LynxTemplatePlugin.getLynxTemplatePluginHooks - cross-module singleton > a tap registered through one copy fires when encode.promise is awaited through the other
basicFunctions adapter > exposes the validators + logic functions consumed by useChecks
basicFunctions adapter > exposes the spec's formatters + side-effect functions
basicFunctions adapter > carries upstream function definitions for handshakes
basicFunctions adapter > registerBasicFunctions > routes a known function through the upstream impl
defineCatalog > bare component derives name from displayName ?? function name
defineCatalog > tuple form derives name + schema from manifest
defineCatalog > mixes bare and tuple inputs in one call
defineCatalog > rejects components with no derivable name
resolveCatalog > returns a name → component map
serializeCatalog > emits version + components, omitting schema when absent
user composes their own all-builtins catalog > paste-able recipe builds the expected manifest
ChoicePicker utils > normalizes variants with the Composer alias
ChoicePicker utils > normalizes options and removes duplicates
ChoicePicker utils > normalizes selected values against available options
ChoicePicker utils > toggles multiple selection values
ChoicePicker utils > replaces mutually exclusive values
ChoicePicker utils > filters options by label or value
createResource > starts in pending status with undefined value
createResource > complete moves to success and exposes value via getSnapshot
createResource > getSnapshot reference changes on every transition
createResource > pending → error transition produces a new snapshot reference
createResource > complete after fail is rejected — error is terminal
createResource > read does not throw when pending
createResource > subscribe is invoked on every complete and disposers stop firing
createResource > promise resolves on first complete
createResource > fail moves to error and rejects promise
createResource > subsequent completes update value but only first resolves promise
DateTimeInput utils > parses date-only values as local calendar parts
DateTimeInput utils > parses local date-time values
DateTimeInput utils > normalizes modes with a usable fallback
DateTimeInput utils > builds a six-week month page so long months are complete
DateTimeInput utils > marks days outside min and max as disabled
DateTimeInput utils > compares date-time parts and wraps time stepping
DateTimeInput utils > normalizes labels, placeholders, and weekday labels
defineCatalog with function entries > separates components and functions
defineCatalog with function entries > rejects duplicate function names
defineCatalog with function entries > serializeCatalog announces functions in the handshake
defineCatalog with function entries > serializeCatalog omits functions array when definitions are absent
defineCatalog with function entries > mergeCatalogs preserves functions and re-registers impls
defineCatalog with function entries > defineFunction without a manifest reads the impl name
executeFunctionCall > routes by name and returns the impl result
executeFunctionCall > resolves data-binding args against the surface store
executeFunctionCall > returns undefined and warns once for unknown functions
executeFunctionCall > resolves array args without turning them into objects
executeFunctionCall > basic functions use upstream zod parsing and data context
FormController > isValid is true when no inputs registered
FormController > isValid is false when any input fails
FormController > isValid flips back to true when failing input is removed
FormController > setOutcome updates existing entries in place
FunctionRegistry > list returns every registered entry
FunctionRegistry > re-registering by name overrides the prior impl
FunctionRegistry > definition is preserved when provided
createMessageStore > starts empty when no initial messages are provided
createMessageStore > getSnapshot is referentially stable between mutations
createMessageStore > push appends a single message and notifies subscribers
createMessageStore > push appends a batch in one notification
createMessageStore > push of an empty array is a no-op
createMessageStore > clear empties the buffer and notifies
createMessageStore > clear is a no-op when already empty
createMessageStore > snapshot is frozen — mutations throw in strict mode
payloadNormalizer > createFallbackMessagesFromPlainText wraps text in a Text component
payloadNormalizer > createTextCardMessages wraps text in a Card with Text child
payloadNormalizer > normalizePayloadToMessages passes through structured messages
payloadNormalizer > normalizePayloadToMessages wraps plain text in fallback
payloadNormalizer > prepareMessagesForProcessing tags messageId and dedupes createSurface
MessageProcessor > beginRendering fires when root component lands
MessageProcessor > deleteSurface emits and clears state
MessageProcessor > updateDataModel writes to surface store
MessageProcessor > expands dynamic children templates on layout components
MessageProcessor > rewrites non-children child references when cloning templates
MessageProcessor > template expansion rewrites Modal child references
MessageProcessor > template expansion rewrites Tabs child references
MessageProcessor > clears dynamic children when template data becomes empty
MessageProcessor > dispatch with no listeners resolves with empty array
resolveDynamic > resolves binding paths relative to the current data context
resolveDynamic > resolves plain data bindings from the surface store
resolveDynamic > evaluates nested function calls when functions are provided
resolveDynamic > leaves nested function calls untouched when functions are not provided
Slider utils > normalizes invalid ranges to defaults
Slider utils > maps A2UI values to lynx-ui ratios
Slider utils > maps lynx-ui ratios back to A2UI values
Slider utils > converts value step to ratio step
Slider utils > rounds stepped values without floating point tails
Slider utils > normalizes labels for display
TextField utils > falls back to textFieldType for composer compatibility
TextField utils > defaults unknown variants to shortText
TextField utils > maps variants to lynx-ui input types
TextField utils > normalizes field values for controlled input rendering
TextField utils > validates values with validationRegexp
TextField utils > ignores absent or invalid validationRegexp values
resolveProperties > resolves path bindings and keeps primitive values
resolveProperties > returns Unsupported Data Syntax for call expressions
resolveProperties > resolves nested bindings inside arrays and objects
resolveProperties > reuses the previous resolved snapshot when values do not change
